LIMBUSCORE-L_C_EVADE_POWER.title: Evade
LIMBUSCORE-L_C_EVADE_POWER.description: Evade all damage below or equal to the stack amount.
LIMBUSCORE-L_C_EVADE_POWER.smartDescript: Evade all damage below or equal to [blue]{Amount}[/blue].

LIMBUSCORE-L_C_POISE_POWER.title: Poise
LIMBUSCORE-L_C_POISE_POWER.description: Boost critical hit chance by [blue]5%[/blue] per [gold]Potency[/gold]. [gold]Crit[/gold] damage is [blue]1.2x[/blue]. Lost after a set [gold]Count[/gold] of hits.
LIMBUSCORE-L_C_POISE_POWER.smartDescript: Boost critical hit chance by [blue]{Potency}*5%[/blue] ([blue]{CritChance}%[/blue]) for the next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] hits. [gold]Crit[/gold] damage is [blue]1.2x[/blue].
LIMBUSCORE-L_C_SINKING_POWER.title: Sinking
LIMBUSCORE-L_C_SINKING_POWER.description: On hit: Lose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn for every [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Potency[/gold]. Lost after a set [gold]Count[/gold] of hits.
LIMBUSCORE-L_C_SINKING_POWER.smartDescri:
On hit: Lose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn for every [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Potency[/gold]. [gold]Potency:[/gold] [blue]{Potency}[/blue]. 
[gold]Count:[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue], decrease by 1 each activation.
LIMBUSCORE-L_C_BURN_POWER.title: Burn
LIMBUSCORE-L_C_BURN_POWER.description: Turn End: Take damage equal to [gold]Potency[/gold]. Lose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Count[/gold] each turn.
LIMBUSCORE-L_C_BURN_POWER.smartDescripti: Turn End: Take [blue]{Potency}[/blue] damage. Lose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Count[/gold] each turn.
LIMBUSCORE-L_C_BLEED_POWER.title: Bleed
LIMBUSCORE-L_C_BLEED_POWER.description: Take damage equal to [gold]Potency[/gold] each time this unit attacks. Lose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Count[/gold] each attack.
LIMBUSCORE-L_C_BLEED_POWER.smartDescript: Take [blue]{Potency}[/blue] damage each time this unit attacks. Lose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Count[/gold] each attack.
LIMBUSCORE-L_C_PARALYZE_POWER.title: Paralyze
LIMBUSCORE-L_C_PARALYZE_POWER.descriptio: Has a chance to fix the next instance of damage dealt to 1. Removed after activation.
LIMBUSCORE-L_C_PARALYZE_POWER.smartDescr: [blue]{ParalyzeChance}%[/blue] chance to fix the next instance of damage dealt to 1. Removed after activation.

LIMBUSCORE-L_C_GLOOMING_POWER.descriptio: [gold]Sinking[/gold] now deals damage. On hit: Take [blue]1[/blue] Damage for every [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Sinking Potency[/gold].
